debug_info.goal:
α✝ : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α✝
α β : Type
inst✝⁵ : Fintype α
inst✝⁴ : Fintype β
inst✝³ : Inhabited α
inst✝² : Inhabited β
inst✝¹ : OracleComp.SampleableType α
inst✝ : OracleComp.SampleableType β
x : α × β
⊢ x ∈ support ((fun x1 x2 => (x1, x2)) <$> OracleComp.uniformSample α inst✝¹ <*> OracleComp.uniformSample β inst✝)

failed_attempts:
cases x with
    | mk a b =>
      simpa [Applicative.seq, Seq.seq, support_map, support_bind, support_uniformSample]
  probOutput_selectElem_eq x y := by sorry --simp
  probFailure_selectElem := by sorry --simp

rcases x with ⟨a, b⟩

      And.intro (show a ∈ support ($ᵗ α) by simpa [support_uniformSample])

  probFailure_selectElem := by sorry --simp
